creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2006-10-31 12:00:37 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    irc/bopm             Makefile pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    irc/bopm/files       bopm.in pkg-deinstall.in pkg-install.in 
                         pkg-message.in 
  Removed files:
    irc/bopm             pkg-deinstall pkg-install pkg-message 
    irc/bopm/files       bopm.sh.sample 
  Log:
  - Update to rc_subr startup script
  - Clean up REINPLACE_CMD usage
  - Use SUB_FILES
  - Deal with bopm.conf properly
  - Now uses /var/log/bopm for pid and logs, and more
  
  PR:             ports/103555
  Submitted by:   Jeremy Chadwick <freebsd@jdc.parodius.com>
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout (1 month)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.6       +28 -10    ports/irc/bopm/Makefile

  1.1       +17 -0     ports/irc/bopm/files/pkg-deinstall.in (new)
  1.1       +48 -0     ports/irc/bopm/files/pkg-install.in (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/irc/bopm/files/pkg-message.in (new)
